caveat: TaxProcessor.totalQuoteSentToMarketing() is monotonic so cumulative will only grow; threshold 70 BNB is conservative as of research time (~72.65 BNB measured 2026-04-26). Recipient is mutable via TaxProcessor.setReceivers (BscScan-verified onlyOwner gate); if test starts failing, run `npx tsx scripts/classify-flap.ts` with RECLASSIFY_TOKEN=0x5f28b56a2f6e396a69fc912aec8d42d8afa17777 to re-read marketAddress(). FlapTaxTokenV3 impl 0x024f1829... and TaxProcessor impl 0x802b5888... source-verified on BscScan.
source: User report 2026-04-26 (token auto-forwards 71.28 BNB to recipient, missing from ClaimScan profile). RESEARCH.md §'Critical Architectural Deviation' verified live RPC: tryGetVault(token) returns found=false; token.taxProcessor() = 0xf9113d16...; taxProcessor.marketAddress() = 0xe4cC6a... (EOA, getCode === '0x'); taxProcessor.totalQuoteSentToMarketing() = 72651582067009655073n (~72.65 BNB).
